revision.text:
[[ja:石神山精神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine | native_name = 石神山精神社 | image = Iwakamiyamazumi.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|38.446758|140.838344}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|az|Ooyamatsimu|de|Ōyamatsumi|en|Ōyamatsumi|fa|اویاماتسومی|fr|Ōyamatsumi|hr|O-Yama-Tsu-mi|ja|オオヤマツミ|ko|오야마쓰미노카미|mni|ꯑꯣꯌꯃꯠꯁꯨꯃꯤ|ru|Ооямацуми|simple|Ōyamatsumi|sv|Ōyamatsumi|zh|大山津見|qid=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine'''|石神山精神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11658590|ltq=Q11658590|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 16 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039986|ltq=Q135039986|qid=Q135039986|1=Sukino Shrine (Q135039986)}} ** P156: {{ill|Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine|lt=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine|ja|鹿島天足別神社|qid=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1205377|ltq=Q1205377|qid=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}} * {{ill|Q907389|ltq=Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} * {{ill|Kurokawa District, Miyagi|lt=Kurokawa district|ceb|Kurokawa-gun|en|Kurokawa District, Miyagi|fr|District de Kurokawa|id|Distrik Kurokawa, Miyagi|it|Distretto di Kurokawa|ja|黒川郡|ko|구로카와군|pl|Powiat Kurokawa|ru|Курокава (уезд)|uk|Повіт Курокава|zh_yue|黑川郡|zh|黑川郡|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}} == 182053 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いわかみやまずみじんじゃ * イハカミ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3370005002712 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Ihakami- Shrine|lt=Ihakami- Shrine|qid=Q135039987|1=Ihakami- Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '宮城県黒川郡大和町吉田字麓71', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:石神山精神社]] {{wikidata link|Q20043188}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine |Image = [[File:Iwakamiyamazumi.JPG|270px]]
Shrine building |Location = Yoshida Aza-Fumoto 71, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|qid=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}{{ill|lt=Taiwa Town|Q1205377|qid=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}} |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}}
{{ill|lt=Ōtoshi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtoshi-no-Kami}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} |Established = Unknown (records exist from {{ill|lt=790|Q31147|qid=Q31147|1=790}} ({{ill|lt=Enryaku|Q1373176|qid=Q1373176|1=Enryaku}} 9)) |Main hall = Main hall in {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} style, steel-sheet roof |Alternative names = Ishigami {{ill|lt=Daimyōjin|Q113497901|qid=Q113497901|1=Daimyōjin}}[https://web.archive.org/web/20150402121043/http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/mutu/bun/mut280502-01.html Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine], Tate Shrine |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = April 15, Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Iwakamiyama Seishin
Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine''' (いわかみやまずみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} located in Yoshida Aza-Fumoto, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|qid=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}{{ill|lt=Taiwa Town|Q1205377|qid=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}}.{{Cite web|ja|url=http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020374|title=Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine|publisher=Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines|accessdate=2015-04-01}} === Overview === It is one of the four Shikinaisha shrines of {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}, and, as indicated by its name, it is an ancient {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} that preserves the form of {{ill|lt=belief|Q5410500|qid=Q5410500|1=Faith}} in which the presence of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=divine spirits|1=UNKNOWN}} was recognized and worshipped in massive rocks. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deities|Q11591100|qid=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} are Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami, Ōtoshi-no-Kami, Ōkuninushi-no-Kami, Kotoshironushi-no-Kami, Uke Mochi-no-Kami, and Kamado-no-Kami. In front of the shrine building stands a cedar tree said by old {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=oral tradition|1=UNKNOWN}} to have been planted by General {{ill|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Q941979|qid=Q941979|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}}. There is also an ancient cedar with a circumference of 7 meters and an age of over 1,000 years. === History === * {{ill|lt=790|Q31147|qid=Q31147|1=790}} ({{ill|lt=Enryaku|Q1373176|qid=Q1373176|1=Enryaku}} 9), November — According to the {{ill|lt=Shoku Nihongi|Q611399|qid=Q611399|1=Shoku Nihongi}}, during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kanmu|Q314846|qid=Q314846|1=Emperor Kanmu}}, the shrine already enjoyed deep devotion from the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Yamato court|1=UNKNOWN}} and received ritual offerings ({{ill|lt=hōhei|Q11445508|qid=Q11445508|1=Hōhei}}). * {{ill|lt=852|Q30383|qid=Q30383|1=852}} ({{ill|lt=Ninju|Q1373077|qid=Q1373077|1=Ninju}} 2), August — During the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Montoku|Q357225|qid=Q357225|1=Emperor Montoku}}, the shrine was granted the divine rank of Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}} ({{ill|lt=Engi (era)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Engi|1=Enchō}} 5) — In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|qid=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as one of the four shrines of Kurokawa District, Mutsu Province ({{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}}). * {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 5), January — Classified as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. * {{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}} (Meiji 40), March — Designated as a shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and cloth. * {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|qid=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42), May 27 — The Unnan Shrine in Aza-Yōgai, {{ill|lt=Takada Village|Q11672137|qid=Q11672137|1=Takada Village}}, and the Yamagami Shrine located in Aza-Yamagami, {{ill|lt=Yoshida Village (Kurokawa District, Miyagi Prefecture)|Q11413899|qid=Q11413899|lt=Yoshida Village|1=Yoshida}}, were {{ill|lt=merged|Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}} into this shrine. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Gyō Shrine|Q22120773|qid=Q22120773|1=Yuki Shrine}} – 15 Shiotogama, Shidota, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|qid=Q28690106|1=Kumano Shrine}} – 16 Shinmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Taiwa Town)|Q22119988|qid=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}{{ill|lt=Taiwa Town|Q1205377|qid=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}} * Suki Shrine – 4 Shimomiyamae, Komaba, {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|qid=Q1204681|1=Ōhira, Miyagi}}, Kurokawa District * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|qid=Q11438808|1=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine}} – 48 Hachiman, Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * 15 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tohoku Expressway|Q428428|qid=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Taiwa Interchange|Q10934247|qid=Q10934247|lt=Taiwa IC|1=Taiwa interchange}} * 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai Hokubu Road|Q11377788|qid=Q11377788|1=Sendai-Hokubu Road}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|qid=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC|1=Tomiya interchange}} === References ===
